config.name: r6_stabilization_gate
config.description: R6 stabilization mini-gate: R6-F (no beta) vs R6-S (softmax) vs transformer baseline. Same 24x512 setup as 100M gate. Success: >=+0.05 BPT vs transformer, kurtosis_max<=2.1, max_act<=52.
